    Subclasses of ReferenceType in com.github.javaparser.ast.type
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ArrayType
    To indicate that a type is an array, it gets wrapped in an ArrayType for every array level it has.
    class 
    ClassOrInterfaceType
    A class or an interface type.
    class 
    TypeParameter
    A type parameter.
